summary: Iteration 156 - Pillar Kit Guard and Service Catalog Bug Fix Testing. All 14 tests PASSED. Backend health check working. Pillar Kit Guard correctly blocks wrong kit requests (travel kit on /fit page blocked, redirects to /travel). Fitness kit allowed on /fit page. Service Catalog API returns services by pillar. Price Calculator working with city/size modifiers.
critical_code_review_comments: Pillar Kit Guard (mira_routes.py lines 3275-3348): Correctly implements early return when kit type doesn't match current pillar
Kit Guard returns kit_blocked=true, blocked_kit_type, and suggested_pillar in response
Service Catalog (service_catalog_routes.py): Returns services with count and services array
Price Calculator: Correctly applies city_modifier, pet_count_modifier, and size_modifier to base_price
seed_data_creation: None - 87 services already seeded via seed_master_services.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Pillar Kit Guard and Service Catalog features verified working. Travel kit blocked on /fit page with redirect to /travel. Fitness kit allowed on /fit. Service catalog returns 50+ services. Price calculator working with modifiers.

test_results.pillar_kit_guard_travel_on_fit: PASS - travel kit blocked on /fit, kit_blocked=true, suggested_pillar=travel
test_results.pillar_kit_guard_fitness_on_fit: PASS - fitness kit allowed on /fit, kit_blocked=false
test_results.pillar_kit_guard_travel_on_travel: PASS - travel kit allowed on /travel, kit_blocked=false
test_results.pillar_kit_guard_grooming_on_fit: PASS - grooming kit blocked on /fit, suggested_pillar=care
test_results.price_calculator_basic: PASS - returns service_id, base_price, total, modifiers, currency
test_results.price_calculator_size: PASS - pet size modifier applied correctly
test_results.mira_chat_basic: PASS - chat endpoint responds with response and session_id
